title: FIFA World Cup 2026 – Annex C: All 495 Third-Place Qualifier Scenarios
source: FIFA World Cup 2026 Competition Regulations (March 2026), Annex C
description: There are 12 groups (A–L) at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Each produces one third-placed team. The 8 best third-placed teams (out of 12) advance to the Round of 32. C(12,8) = 495 possible combinations exist. For each combination, FIFA has pre-defined exactly which third-placed team faces which group winner in the Round of 32 matches that involve a third-placed team. The 8 relevant R32 matches are: M74 (1E), M77 (1I), M79 (1A), M80 (1L), M81 (1D), M82 (1G), M85 (1B), M87 (1K). The remaining 8 R32 matches (M73, M75, M76, M78, M83, M84, M86, M88) pair runners-up only and are fixed regardless of scenario. Notation: '3X' means the third-placed team from Group X.

fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M73: Runner-up Group A (2A) vs Runner-up Group B (2B)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M75: Winner Group F (1F) vs Runner-up Group C (2C)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M76: Winner Group C (1C) vs Runner-up Group F (2F)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M78: Runner-up Group E (2E) vs Runner-up Group I (2I)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M83: Runner-up Group K (2K) vs Runner-up Group L (2L)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M84: Winner Group H (1H) vs Runner-up Group J (2J)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M86: Winner Group J (1J) vs Runner-up Group H (2H)
fixed_r32_matches_unaffected_by_scenario.M88: Runner-up Group D (2D) vs Runner-up Group G (2G)

notation_key.1X: Group winner of Group X (1st place)
notation_key.3X: Third-placed team from Group X (3rd place)
notation_key.MXX: Match number XX in the official FIFA schedule
